zh.lifeSummary: Agnes於1490年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。她於大約1510年與John Childe在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年3月25日在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes于1490年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。她于大约1510年与John Childe在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年3月25日在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes was born in 1490, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Childe about 1510, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 March 1569, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes est née en 1490, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Childe environ 1510, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1569, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes wurde 1490 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1510 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom John Childe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. März 1569 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes è nata il nel 1490 nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato John Childe circa 1510, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 marzo 1569, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnesは1490年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで生まれた。約1510年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでJohn Childeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1569年3月25日に故郷で79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(은)는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 John Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 3월 25일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes nasceu em 1490, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John Childe aproximadamente 1510, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1569, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes родилась в 1490 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Childe около 1510 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 марта 1569 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes nació en 1490, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con John Childe aproximadamente 1510, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1569, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
